body:
Set up pytest with DB fixtures and target 40% coverage on critical paths.

**Scope:**
- pytest + pytest-cov configuration
- DB fixtures (mock or test database)
- API endpoint tests for all agents
- LLM mock fixtures for testing without API calls
- CI integration (run tests on PR)

**Current state:** 3 manual test files for ~16,500 LOC. 0% automated coverage.
title: refactor: pytest infrastructure + critical path coverage
